scripts.types: supabase gen types typescript --project-id $SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF --schema public > src/types/database.ts
scripts.types:local: supabase gen types typescript --local --schema public > src/types/database.ts
scripts.fns:deploy: supabase functions deploy --no-verify-jwt qr_sign && supabase functions deploy qr_verify && supabase functions deploy send_validation_mail && supabase functions deploy trigger_safer_alert && supabase functions deploy ban_validator && supabase functions deploy rgpd_purge
